name: WLF_LI_ACTIVITIES_F
description: Table to store details of activities in a class

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Learning item id pk

columns.Name: ACTIVITY_ID
columns.Comments: Activity Id.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: PARENT_LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: The learning item that this activity is the child of

columns.Name: RELATED_CONTENT_ID
columns.Comments: RELATED_CONTENT_ID

columns.Name: COMPLETION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicate the completion type of this activity (Required, Optional, etc)

columns.Name: DUE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the due date of the activity

columns.Name: VIRTUAL_CLASSROOM_URL
columns.Comments: VIRTUAL_CLASSROOM_URL

columns.Name: ACTIVITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates what type of activity this is

columns.Name: CONTENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates what type of content

columns.Name: SERIES_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of activity series profile. Foreign key to WLF_ACTIVITY_SERIES_PROFILE_F.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: SELF_COMPLETE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate if the learner able to mark this activity complete

columns.Name: SECTION_LI_ID
columns.Comments: Column value represents section learning item id of the activity

columns.Name: TIME_ZONE
columns.Comments: Time zone of the start and end date

columns.Name: ACT_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_PREDECESSOR_ID
columns.Comments: Used to store predecessor activity calculated by position

columns.Name: ELEARNING_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the elearning type of the content associated with activity

columns.Name: CLASSROOM_DISPLAY_NAME
columns.Comments: Indicates external event classroom name

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_DETAILS_URL
columns.Comments: Indicates external event details

columns.Name: COMPLETION_RULE
columns.Comments: Indicates completion rule for event activity

columns.Name: AUTO_COMPLETION_RULE_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate if automated completion based on percentage or minutes of total duration is enabled for VILT event activities

columns.Name: AUTO_COMPLETION_RULE_UNITS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether it is percentage or minutes based completion

columns.Name: AUTO_COMPLETION_RULE_VALUE
columns.Comments: The minimum attendance duration in minutes or percentage required by learner to automatically trigger VILT activity completion

columns.Name: BREAKOUT_ROOMS_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Configuration to specify whether breakout rooms are enabled

columns.Name: ONLINE_MEETING_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates if the type of online meeting
